title: BEM-778 quarantine workflows
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/workflows/quarantine','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 19:33 (UTC+3)'
quarantined=[]
for name in ['claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','claude-internal-auditor-mailbox.yml','claude-dispatch-bridge.yml','dispatcher-wake-smoke.yml']:
    src=Path('.github/workflows')/name
    if src.exists():
        dst=Path('governance/workflows/quarantine')/(name+'.quarantined.md')
        content=src.read_text(errors='ignore')
        dst.write_text('# QUARANTINED WORKFLOW | '+name+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Причина: experimental Claude wake-up workflow caused repeated workflow-lint-gate failures. Kept as text artifact, not active GitHub workflow.'+sep+sep+'```yaml'+sep+content+sep+'```'+sep)
        src.unlink()
        quarantined.append({'from':str(src),'to':str(dst)})
# Remove direct fallback trigger workflow if present? It is listed above. Keep scripts but inactive.
pending=Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem778_next_verify_lint_stable_and_return_mailbox_file_handoff.md')
pending.write_text('# BEM-778 Next | Verify lint stable and return to mailbox/file handoff'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Next: verify no active experimental workflows remain, workflow-lint-gate has no new violations, and use file/mailbox handoff path until real Claude runtime is separately proven.'+sep)
handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-778 EXPERIMENTAL WORKFLOWS QUARANTINED'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Quarantined experimental Claude workflows from active GitHub workflows. Next: verify lint stability and return to mailbox/file handoff.'+sep+'Operator relay: forbidden.'+sep)
state={'schema_version':'quarantine_experimental_claude_workflows.v1','bem':'BEM-778','status':'experimental_claude_workflows_quarantined','quarantined':quarantined,'blocker':None,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem778_quarantine_experimental_claude_workflows.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem778_quarantine_experimental_claude_workflows.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-778 | Quarantine Experimental Claude Workflows | QUARANTINED'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Quarantined workflows: '+str(len(quarantined))+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem778_quarantine_experimental_claude_workflows','status':'experimental_claude_workflows_quarantined','quarantined_count':len(quarantined),'blocker':None,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem778_quarantine_experimental_claude_workflows.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-778 quarantined experimental Claude workflows count='+str(len(quarantined))+'\n')
changed_files.extend([q['to'] for q in quarantined]+[str(pending),str(handoff),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Quarantined experimental Claude wake-up workflows from .github/workflows to stop repeated workflow-lint-gate failure loop')
"""
